ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of the match date and time */,
  "date_gmt" TEXT /* Date and time of the match in GMT */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the match (e.g., complete, ongoing) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance for the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "game_week" INTEGER /* Game week number */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "match_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays home matches */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the referee is from */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience as a referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the player is from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team stat entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the stats belong to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "home_ppg" REAL /* Pre-match predicted points per game for home team */,
  "away_ppg" REAL /* Pre-match predicted points per game for away team */,
  "home_team_goal_count" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_team_goal_count" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "total_goals" INTEGER /* Total number of goals in the match */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots off target */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Total number of corners taken */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total number of fouls committed */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards issued */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the goal occurred */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that scored the goal */,
  "goal_count" INTEGER /* Total count of goals scored in the match */,
  "goal_timings" TEXT /* Timings of each goal scored (e.g., '38,56') */,
  "goal_scorer" INTEGER /* ID of the player who scored the goal */,
  "goal_assist" INTEGER /* ID of the player who assisted the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_events_goal_scorer FOREIGN KEY ("goal_scorer") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_events_goal_assist FOREIGN KEY ("goal_assist") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corners" (
  "corner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corner event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the corners occurred */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that had the corners */,
  "corner_count" INTEGER /* Total count of corners taken by the team */,
  "corner_timings" TEXT /* Timings of each corner taken (e.g., '15,30,45') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corners_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corners_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the cards occurred */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team receiving the cards */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total count of yellow cards issued to the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total count of red cards issued to the team */,
  "card_timings" TEXT /* Timings of each card issued (e.g., '20,40,60') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the shots were taken */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that took the shots */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Total number of shots taken by the team */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots off target */,
  "shot_timings" TEXT /* Timings of each shot taken (e.g., '10,20,30') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "possession" (
  "possession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each possession event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where possession was recorded */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team with the possession */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of possession held by the team */,
  "pass_completion_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of successful passes completed by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("possession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_possession_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_possession_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expected_goals" (
  "xg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expected goals event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where xG was calculated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "expected_goals" REAL /* Expected goals for the team during the match */,
  "expected_goals_against" REAL /* Expected goals against the team during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("xg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expected_goals_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expected_goals_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odds entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "home_win_odds" REAL /* Odds for home team to win */,
  "draw_odds" REAL /* Odds for a draw */,
  "away_win_odds" REAL /* Odds for away team to win */,
  "over_2_5_odds" REAL /* Odds for over 2.5 goals */,
  "under_2_5_odds" REAL /* Odds for under 2.5 goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the injury occurred */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, concussion) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match attended */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team supported */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Name of the fan */,
  "fan_age" INTEGER /* Age of the fan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fans_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fans_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
